'''Chule''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]]. It was a [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] planet with no geological activity, covered in [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and barren plains. Its [[Local day/Legends|local day]] lasted 49 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]; its [[Standard year/Legends|year]] lasted 145 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]].
